title: Simultaneous second derivative spectrophotometric determination of copper(n) and nickel(II) using 1-phenyl-1,2-propanedione-2-oxime thiosemicarbazone
author: N. B. L. Prasad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Oil Technological Research Institute, JNTU, Anantapur-515 001, Andhra Pradesh, India 
Department of Chemistry, Sri Krishnadevaraya University, Anantapur-515 003, Andhra Pradesh, India 
 Manuscript received 17 August 2006, revised 27 February 2007, accepted 12 March 2007  

 The reagent, l-phenyl-1,2-propancdione-2-oxime lhiosemicarbazone (PPDOT) has been used for the determination of Cu II  and Ni II  by spectrophotometric method. Second derivative methods have been developed for the determination of Cu ll  and Ni II  using PPDOT when they are present alone. Simultaneous determination of Cu ll  and Ni II  in synthetic mixtures was carried out by measuring the amplitude at 482.5 and 441 nm respectively without the need for employing simultaneous equation.
